title: cestichis microblepharon
side_effects: Cestichis microblepharon can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches, which may be caused by consuming excessive amounts of the plant's toxic compounds. In severe cases, improper use of Cestichis microblepharon can lead to respiratory problems, such as shortness of breath and bronchitis, due to the release of irritant particles into the air. Additionally, improper preparation and handling of the plant may result in skin irritation, including redness and rashes, and allergic reactions such as itching and swelling. If left untreated, these side effects can escalate into more serious conditions, making it essential to use the plant with caution and under the guidance of a qualified expert.
